meaning: [亚瑟王传奇]加雷思(园桌骑士之一,亚瑟王的侄子)
examples: We've seen it all before with Stuart Pearce, Gareth Southgate, and Chris Waddle, who've missed penalties and got the blame of the nation.
Theo shared a room with Gareth Bale and I was next door.
Spurs midfielder Gareth Bale was also courtside to take in the action.
Gareth Williams is curator of early medieval coins as well as a union co-ordinator.
Glentoran protested and referee Moutray consulted assistant Gareth Eakin before confirming the spot-kick verdict.
